2606.14356.title: PLAIground: SLO-Driven Runtime Model Selection for Compound AI Systems in the Edge-Cloud-Space Continuum
2606.14356.paper_summary: Applications in the 3D Computing Continuum, which unifies edge, cloud, and space, require combining multiple AI tasks such as object detection, time-series analytics, and natural language processing into Compound AI systems. These systems must satisfy stringent Service Level Objectives (SLOs) on accuracy, latency, and cost. A key mechanism for maintaining SLO compliance of Compound AI systems is runtime model selection, where AI models are dynamically switched for each workflow task. However, existing distributed and compound AI frameworks do not natively support runtime model selection. We present PLAIground, a framework that enables runtime model selection for Compound AI systems. PLAIground introduces Compoundable AI Model (CAIM) abstraction, which decouples task semantics from AI model implementations via Task and Data Contracts, enabling model switching without workflow changes. Additionally, PLAIground introduces Pixie, an SLO-driven runtime model selection algorithm, which dynamically selects the most suitable model for each task during execution. Our evaluation on two realistic Compound AI workflows demonstrates that Pixie achieves up to 91.3% accuracy while maintaining SLO compliance where fixed-model strategies either violate cost and latency budgets up to 21x or miss accuracy targets by 4%.
2606.14356.paper_summary_zh: 應用於統一邊緣、雲端和空間的 3D 計算連續體需要將多個 AI 任務結合起來，例如物體檢測、時間序列分析和自然語言處理，形成複合 AI 系統。這些系統必須滿足在準確性、延遲和成本方面的嚴格服務水平目標 (SLO)。維持複合 AI 系統 SLO 合規性的關鍵機制是運行時模型選擇，在此過程中，AI 模型會根據每個工作流程任務動態切換。然而，現有的分佈式和複合 AI 框架並不原生支持運行時模型選擇。我們提出了 PLAIground，一個支持複合 AI 系統運行時模型選擇的框架。PLAIground 引入了可複合 AI 模型 (CAIM) 抽象，通過任務和數據合約將任務語義與 AI 模型實現解耦，從而實現無需更改工作流程的模型切換。此外，PLAIground 還引入了 Pixie，一種以 SLO 為驅動的運行時模型選擇算法，該算法在執行過程中動態選擇每個任務最合適的模型。我們在兩個現實的複合 AI 工作流程上的評估顯示，Pixie 在保持 SLO 合規的同時達到了高達 91.3% 的準確率，而固定模型策略要麼在成本和延遲預算上違規高達 21 倍，要麼準確率目標低於 4%。
2606.14356.author: Milos Gravara et.al.
2606.14356.authors: Milos Gravara, Cynthia Marcelino, Andrija Stanisic, Stefan Nastic
